description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular metal head and a long, straight wooden handle. The head is solid and blocky, showing a slightly weathered, dark metallic surface with some discoloration and minor surface marks, suggesting frequent use. The handle is made of light-colored wood, appearing smooth and cylindrical, with a subtle taper towards the end for a secure grip. The junction between the head and handle is tightly fitted, with no visible fasteners or additional reinforcements. The hammer's overall proportions indicate it is designed for delivering powerful blows, suitable for demolition or heavy construction tasks. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or additional attachments on the hammer.
description: A heavy sledgehammer with a rectangular metal head and a long, smooth wooden handle, showing signs of use and weathering.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the rectangular metal head, highlighting the hammer's overall proportions.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, with the head appearing as a narrow rectangle, emphasizing the straightness and thickness of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the head and handle, with minor surface marks visible.
description_view_3: Front view of the hammer's striking face, displaying the full width of the rectangular head and the handle's attachment point.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, smooth, cylindrical, with a slight taper towards the end
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head, solid steel, with flat striking faces on both ends
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: minor surface marks and discoloration on the head, slight weathering on the handle
